experience.title: Where I've worked
experience.description: In software and QA since 2021, focused on backend since 2023 — across financial software and large-scale internet services. The path matters as much as the destination.

stack.title: Tools I reach for
stack.description: At work I keep the toolkit narrow and go deep. Side projects are where I go wide and experiment.

projects.title: Three projects, three different problems
projects.description: Personal projects I build to study patterns I can't always reach at work. Picked for depth, not for showcase value.
